payload.name: 607-611 Nelray Blvd — North Loop Redevelopment

site.currentImprovements: two duplexes and one single-family home, fully leased

payload.apsModelUrnTodo: TODO(WS-1 Part A): the deal's building twin URN is a placeholder. Backfill with the real APS model URN (urn:adsk.objects... base64) after the RVT upload + Model Derivative completes. Part A is BLOCKED until APS_CLIENT_ID / APS_CLIENT_SECRET land in .env. WS-4 (spatial twin / APS viewer) loads this URN; the entitlement finding's height check finalizes against APS-extracted height at the same time.

provenance.produced: the deal molecule: building twin + units + parcels + zoning + code + flood + entitlement finding + operating pro forma
provenance.citation: WS-1 dispatch brief Part C; docs/property_ground_truth.md.

reasoning: The deal molecule composes the full Nelray opportunity from its member atoms. Ground-truth atoms (parcels, zoning, code, flood, the hero entitlement finding) are public-free and produced from the Hauska place/parcel + code substrate; the operating pro forma is tenant-private (the two-flywheel partition). The building twin and unit atoms are provisional because APS extraction (Part A) is blocked; the deal's apsModelUrn is a clearly-marked placeholder with a TODO for backfill when APS credentials land. Composition edges follow the @hauska/atom-contract pattern (childEntityType + childMode + dataKey), with member rows under `members[dataKey]` carrying each child's atomDid.

confidence.stateNote: Molecule is assembled and provenance-backed across ground-truth atoms; building/unit members are provisional pending APS, and the operating side is a seed projection. Baseline, not earned-calibrated.
